superpowers.name: superpowers
superpowers.description: Official Claude Code superpowers bundle: enhanced reasoning, web search, and code execution
superpowers.author: claude-plugins-official

1.0.0.description: Adds enhanced reasoning chains, real-time web search, and sandboxed code execution to Claude Code.
1.0.0.activationNote: Restart Claude Code to activate the new superpowers.

superpowers.name: git-tools
superpowers.description: Advanced git operations: interactive rebase, stash manager, and conflict resolver
superpowers.author: claude-plugins-official

1.1.0.description: Adds stash manager and branch visualizer.

1.2.0.description: Adds interactive conflict resolver with AI-assisted merge suggestions.

superpowers.name: code-review
superpowers.description: Automated code review with security checks, style enforcement, and complexity metrics
superpowers.author: claude-plugins-official

2.0.0.description: Security vulnerability scanning and complexity analysis.

2.0.1.description: Bug fixes for Python and Go support.

superpowers.name: test-pilot
superpowers.description: AI-generated test suites: unit, integration, and snapshot tests for any language
superpowers.author: claude-plugins-official

0.8.0.description: Unit test generation for JavaScript and TypeScript.

0.9.0.description: Adds Python, Go, and Rust support plus integration test scaffolding.

superpowers.name: docs-writer
superpowers.description: Generate and maintain project documentation, API references, and changelogs
superpowers.author: claude-plugins-official

1.1.0.description: Adds changelog tracking and JSDoc/TSDoc/OpenAPI support.

superpowers.name: db-assist
superpowers.description: Database schema design, migration generation, and query optimization
superpowers.author: claude-plugins-official

1.0.2.description: Query plan analysis and index recommendations.

superpowers.name: perf-profiler
superpowers.description: Runtime performance profiling, flamegraph visualization, and bottleneck detection
superpowers.author: claude-plugins-official

0.5.0.description: Flamegraph generation and AI-driven optimization suggestions.

superpowers.name: deploy-buddy
superpowers.description: One-command deployments to AWS, GCP, Azure, and Vercel with rollback support
superpowers.author: claude-plugins-official

1.2.0.description: AWS (Lambda, EC2, S3) and GCP (Cloud Run) support.

1.3.0.description: Adds Azure and rollback/canary deployment strategies.

superpowers.name: frontend-design
superpowers.description: AI-powered UI design assistant: component generation, Tailwind theming, and accessibility audits
superpowers.author: claude-plugins-official

1.0.0.description: Generate React/Vue/Svelte components from natural-language descriptions, apply Tailwind themes, and run WCAG accessibility audits.
1.0.0.activationNote: Restart Claude Code to enable the frontend-design superpower.
